_doc: v0.24.0 agent-resilience-supervisor config. Copy to .agent-toolkit/resilience.json. Drives tools/agent_supervisor.py (external watcher) + the session_brief resume-brief. The watcher is READ-ONLY by default (detect stall → notify); pass --relaunch (CLI-only) for auto-relaunch. SMTP/webhook credentials are NEVER put here — they live in .codex/mcp.local.env (gitignored): SMTP_HOST/PORT/USER/PASSWORD/FROM/TO, WEBHOOK_URL.

_schema.stall_seconds: int — transcript idle beyond this (and autonomy active) → notify (default 180; generous because notify-only)
_schema.notify_cooldown: int — min seconds between repeat notifications for the same stall (default 300)
_schema.relaunch_cap: int — CLI --relaunch only: max auto-relaunch attempts before giving up + notifying (default 10)
_schema.backoff_base: int — CLI --relaunch only: exponential backoff base seconds (2 → 2,4,8,16,...)
_schema.cpu_idle_pct: float — reserved: CPU% under which a silent process is considered idle
_schema.notify.channels: list — any of log|toast|smtp|webhook; 'log' is always added
